Jace is a 24-year-old law school graduate and humanist who has made a name for himself as one of the most prominent and respected critique YouTubers in the industry. With his podcast-style videos, featuring gameplay footage as a backdrop, Jace delivers unfiltered and often harsh critiques of the influencer world, holding accountable those who he deems deserving of public scrutiny and derision. His channel, "Disjace," serves as a platform for his uncompromising worldview and unwavering commitment to the truth, no matter how unpalatable it may be to those on the receiving end of his withering criticism.
